name: Assignment of a Fixed Address to a Pointer
description: The product sets a pointer to a specific fixed memory address other than NULL. Fixed addresses are not portable across environments and platforms, potentially causing crashes or enabling attackers to inject malicious code at predictable memory locations.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node that assigns a hardcoded numeric value (other than 0/NULL) to a pointer variable in STORAGE. Look for pointer assignments where the source is a literal address constant rather than a dynamically allocated address.
